x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Risk records provide the risk context Now Assist GRC uses for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate risk register for key business domains. Assign risk owners. Map risks to controls. Target: 20+ active risks.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc6
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Risk records provide the risk context Now Assist GRC uses for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Risk Register Population</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active risk records';

    if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active risks — Now Assist GRC has sufficient risk context for AI-driven scoring and mitigation recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active risks (target: 20+). Now Assist GRC risk recommendations will have limited coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active risks. Now Assist GRC requires a populated risk register for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>GRC</module>
<number>CHK0006082</number>
<order>30</order>
<remediation_guidance>Populate risk register for key business domains. Assign risk owners. Map risks to controls. Target: 20+ active risks.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc6</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
